misc.title: Infantino has finally decided to put the ring on Messi’s finger after years of dating Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨💍 OFFICIAL: FIFA to award the winners of the World Cup with championship ring
misc.text: Infantino has finally decided to put the ring on Messi’s finger after years of dating Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨💍 OFFICIAL: FIFA to award the winners of the World Cup with championship rings. It’s the first time in history, following some of the American sports. 30 rings will be made available to the world champions, with a further 1,996 rings going on sale to fans. — https://nitter.net/FabrizioRomano/status/2078112901320085681#m

misc.title: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an av
misc.text: US Americans in the comments are like Boruto haters: They both have a basically non existent reading comprehension #BORUTO Pop Base (@PopBase) France recorded its hottest-ever day yesterday with an average temperature of 29.8°C Around 40 people are confirmed to have drowned while swimming in efforts to cool down. (theguardian.com/world/2026/j…) Community note: The 29.8°C is France's national average of day and night temperatures across 30 weather stations; local highs reached 44.3°C. The 40 drownings occurred over the past week during the heatwave. apnews.com/article/heat-w… bbc.com/news/articles/… — https://nitter.net/PopBase/status/2069754874074398969#m

misc.title: TV Anime "BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity -" (Cour 4) is listed for ONLY 10 EPISODES in total ! The ‘Final Part’, directed by Hikaru Murata at Studio PIERROT FILMS, is scheduled to prem
misc.text: TV Anime "BLEACH: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Calamity -" (Cour 4) is listed for ONLY 10 EPISODES in total ! The ‘Final Part’, directed by Hikaru Murata at Studio PIERROT FILMS, is scheduled to premiere July 25.
